Music and Computers

Sampling a Phaser

A phaser is a rotating vector. In this Applet we periodically sample the Y value of the vector and display it.

To Do:

  • Move the fader slightly to the right until you see a curve being drawn.
  • Don't move the fader for awhile. What kind of curve do you see?
  • Move the fader to the right further. Notice how the phaser spins faster and the wavelength of the signal becomes shorter.
